questionTextSource: What is the correct course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: If a cyclist suddenly comes from the left, you must do an emergency stop.
answerASource: I perform an emergency braking manoeuvre
answerBSource: I continue driving, ready to brake
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Agar velosipedchi chap tomondan to‘satdan chiqib kelsa, siz favqulodda tormoz berishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Tormozga tayyor holda harakatni davom ettiraman

questionTextSource: While driving, a deer crosses the road in front of your vehicle. What should you be aware of?
explanationSource: A deer is very unpredictable, maybe it runs back into the forest, maybe it will stop in the middle of the street. You should therefore reduce your speed and follow what is happening, as other animals can also step on the road.
answerASource: Other animals might follow the deer
answerBSource: The deer might stop in the middle of the road
answerCSource: I can scare off the deer by turning on my main beam lights
questionTextTarget: Haydash vaqtida kiyik avtomobilingiz oldidan yo‘lni kesib o‘tdi. Nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Kiyikning harakati oldindan aytib bo‘lmaydi: u o‘rmonga qaytib ketishi yoki yo‘lning o‘rtasida to‘xtab qolishi mumkin. Shuning uchun tezlikni kamaytirib, vaziyatni kuzatishingiz kerak, chunki boshqa hayvonlar ham yo‘lga chiqishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Kiyik ortidan boshqa hayvonlar ham chiqishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Kiyik yo‘lning o‘rtasida to‘xtab qolishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Uzoqni yorituvchi faralarni yoqib, kiyikni qo‘rqitib yuborishim mumkin

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: As the lorry in front of you is parking in reverse, you must continue to slow down. You can only change lanes when the lane to your left is free. Stay in your lane for the time being and continue braking.
answerASource: I continue braking
answerBSource: I remain waiting in my lane for now
answerCSource: I steer to the left now
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Oldingizdagi yuk mashinasi orqaga yurib parkovka qilayotgani uchun siz sekinlashishda davom etishingiz kerak. Chap yo‘lak bo‘sh bo‘lgandagina yo‘lakni almashtirishingiz mumkin. Hozircha o‘z yo‘lagizda qoling va tormozlashni davom ettiring.

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate in this situation?
explanationSource:
You are driving on a turning priority road. Anyone leaving a priority road must give way to vehicles following the priority road.
The yellow car flashes and turns left. Although it does not have right of way, at its high speed it will not be able to stop without coming into your lane. You should therefore brake and give up your right of way to avoid a collision. The obligation to avoid accidents takes precedence over all right of way rules.
answerASource: That [the yellow car] will turn left
answerBSource: That I will have to yield my right of way
answerCSource: That [the pedestrian] will cross the road
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz ustunlikka ega buriluvchi yo‘lda harakatlanyapsiz. Ustun yo‘ldan chiqayotgan har bir haydovchi ustun yo‘l bo‘ylab harakatlanayotgan transport vositalariga yo‘l berishi kerak. Sariq avtomobil burilish chirog‘ini yoqib, chapga burilmoqda. U ustunlikka ega bo‘lmasa ham, yuqori tezligi sabab sizning yo‘lagingizga chiqmay turib to‘xtay olmaydi. Shuning uchun to‘qnashuvning oldini olish uchun tormoz berib, ustunlik huquqingizdan voz kechishingiz kerak. Avariyaning oldini olish majburiyati barcha ustunlik qoidalaridan ustun turadi.
answerBTarget: Ustunlik huquqimdan voz kechishimga to‘g‘ri kelishiga

questionTextSource: What is the right behaviour now?
explanationSource:
In the left side mirror you can see that a car behind you is about to overtake. At the same time, the person on the bike on the right in front of you could move onto the road. A truck is also coming towards you on the opposite lane. All three factors lead to a narrow roadway and thus increase the risk of accidents.
In this situation you have to brake to avoid a collision with the overtaking car and the cyclist.
answerASource: I brake
answerBSource: I swerve to the left
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri xatti-harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Chap yon ko‘zguda ortingizdagi avtomobil sizni quvib o‘tmoqchi ekanini ko‘ryapsiz. Shu bilan bir vaqtda o‘ng old tomondagi velosipedchi yo‘lga chiqib ketishi mumkin. Qarama-qarshi yo‘lakdan yuk mashinasi ham kelmoqda. Bu uch omil yo‘lni toraytiradi va avariya xavfini oshiradi. Bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tayotgan avtomobil va velosipedchi bilan to‘qnashuvdan qochish uchun tormoz berishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: The cyclist from the left does not seem to slow down, so brake sharply.
answerASource: I brake very sharply
answerBSource: I sound my horn and continue driving
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Chap tomondagi velosipedchi sekinlashmayotgandek ko‘rinmoqda, shuning uchun keskin tormoz bering.

questionTextSource: Why must you brake now?
explanationSource: Because the cyclist wants to be in your lane, brake because of the cyclist.
answerASource: Because of [the cyclist]
answerBSource: Because of [the red vehicle]
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir tormoz berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Velosipedchi sizning yo‘lagizga chiqmoqchi bo‘lgani uchun, velosipedchi sabab tormoz berishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What must you watch out for now?
explanationSource: The cyclist on the right is riding on the roadway. There is a cyclist on the left whom we must let go first as a result of our turning procedure.
answerASource: For [the cyclist] on the left
answerBSource: For [the cyclist] on the right
questionTextTarget: Hozir nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: O‘ng tomondagi velosipedchi qatnov qismida yurmoqda. Chap tomonda esa velosipedchi bor, burilish jarayoni sabab avval uni o‘tkazib yuborishimiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate in this situation?
explanationSource: As you are driving behind a large vehicle, it can quickly happen that you are overlooked by oncoming traffic. The danger sign warns of rolling gravel on the road.
answerASource: The driver of the [yellow] car fails to see me
answerBSource: There are loose chippings on the roadway
answerCSource: The tractor in front of me, will turn right
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz katta transport vositasi ortidan ketayotganingiz uchun, qarshidan kelayotgan transport sizni tezda payqamay qolishi mumkin. Xavf belgisi yo‘lda sochilma shag‘al borligi haqida ogohlantiradi.

questionTextSource: You are driving outside of a built-up area. What is the correct course of action in this situation?
explanationSource:
This is not a protected cycle path. You may therefore continue to use the cycle path.
When entering another road, you must make sure that the road is clear. There is a "Give way" sign here. This means that the cyclists on the other side of the road have the right of way and you must wait. You should check for yourself that the road is clear.
You must still make sure that the road is clear for crossing.
answerASource: I only continue driving once I have reassured myself that the road is clear
answerBSource: I do not have to reassure myself that the road is clear, because [the cyclist] is moving
answerCSource: I may no longer continue using the cycle path
questionTextTarget: Siz aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida ketyapsiz. Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Bu himoyalangan veloyo‘lak emas. Shu sabab veloyo‘lakdan foydalanishda davom etishingiz mumkin. Boshqa yo‘lga kirayotganda yo‘l bo‘shligiga ishonch hosil qilishingiz kerak. Bu yerda “Yo‘l bering” belgisi bor. Bu yo‘lning narigi tomonidagi velosipedchilar ustunlikka ega ekanini va siz kutishingiz kerakligini bildiradi. Yo‘l bo‘shligini o‘zingiz tekshirishingiz kerak. Yo‘lni kesib o‘tish uchun hali ham yo‘l bo‘shligiga ishonch hosil qilishingiz shart.
answerATarget: Yo‘l bo‘shligiga ishonch hosil qilganimdan keyingina davom etaman
answerBTarget: Yo‘l bo‘shligini tekshirishim shart emas, chunki [velosipedchi] harakatlanmoqda
answerCTarget: Endi veloyo‘lakdan foydalanishda davom etishim mumkin emas

questionTextSource: Why should you be ready to brake now?
explanationSource: The brown vehicle has just stopped, there is a high risk that a person will get out hastily and carelessly in the next moment. Therefore, you must be ready to brake.
answerASource: Because the driver of the brown vehicle could exit the vehicle
answerBSource: Because [the pedestrian] could walk out onto the road
answerCSource: Because the bus could move across onto my lane
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir tormozga tayyor turishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Jigarrang transport vositasi hozirgina to‘xtadi, keyingi lahzada kimdir shoshilib va ehtiyotsiz ravishda undan tushib qolishi xavfi yuqori. Shuning uchun tormozga tayyor turishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Jigarrang transport vositasi haydovchisi avtomobildan tushishi mumkinligi sabab
answerCTarget: Avtobus mening yo‘lagimga chiqishi mumkinligi sabab

questionTextSource: What is the right thing to do in this situation?
explanationSource: The cyclist is obviously crossing the road without paying attention to the traffic situation and without braking. Use emergency braking to avoid a collision.
answerASource: I perform an emergency braking manoeuvre
answerBSource: I continue driving, ready to brake
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat nima?
explanationTarget: Velosipedchi yo‘l harakati vaziyatiga e’tibor bermasdan va tormozlamasdan yo‘lni kesib o‘tayotgani aniq. To‘qnashuvning oldini olish uchun favqulodda tormoz bering.
answerBTarget: Tormozga tayyor holda harakatni davom ettiraman

questionTextSource: A motorist has had too much alcohol to drink and therefore must not drive. How is it not possible for him to recover his ability to drive in a short time?
explanationSource: After heavy consumption of alcohol, there's no quick way to restore your ability to drive. Neither sleeping nor walking is enough. The alcohol concentration in the blood also does not change by drinking strong coffee. The body breaks down only about 0.1 permille alcohol per hour.
answerASource: - sleeping for half an hour
answerBSource: - drinking two cups of strong coffee
answerCSource: - going for a walk for half an hour
questionTextTarget: Haydovchi juda ko‘p spirtli ichimlik ichgan va shu sabab haydashi mumkin emas. Qanday usullar bilan u qisqa vaqt ichida haydash qobiliyatini tiklay olmaydi?
explanationTarget: Ko‘p miqdorda spirtli ichimlik iste’mol qilingandan keyin haydash qobiliyatini tez tiklashning yo‘li yo‘q. Uxlash ham, piyoda yurish ham yetarli emas. Kuchli qahva ichish ham qondagi alkogol miqdorini o‘zgartirmaydi. Tana soatiga atigi taxminan 0,1 promille alkogolni parchalaydi.

questionTextSource: Which substances can impair fitness to drive in a similar way to alcohol?
explanationSource: Drugs, in particular, change perceptions and impair the ability to respond quickly and appropriately. Because of this, drug use of any kind make you unfit to drive. Even some medicines can impair your driving abilities. If you are prescribed medication by the doctor, pay attention to the instructions in the instruction leaflet.
answerASource: Certain medicines and intoxicants
answerBSource: A cup of coffee
questionTextTarget: Qaysi moddalar haydashga yaroqlilikni alkogol kabi buzishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ayniqsa giyohvand moddalar idrokni o‘zgartiradi va tez hamda to‘g‘ri javob berish qobiliyatini pasaytiradi. Shu sabab har qanday giyohvand modda haydashga yaroqsiz holatga olib keladi. Ba’zi dorilar ham haydash qobiliyatiga salbiy ta’sir qilishi mumkin. Agar shifokor sizga dori yozgan bo‘lsa, qo‘llanmadagi ko‘rsatmalarga e’tibor bering.
answerATarget: Ayrim dorilar va mast qiluvchi moddalar

questionTextSource: What can impair fitness to drive?
explanationSource: Anything that negatively affects the sense organs can reduce the ability to drive. In addition to drugs, this includes medications, so you should read the package leaflet before taking them. At a blood alcohol level of 0.3 permille, you are already unfit to drive. Fatigue is one of the most common causes of accidents. Here your attention and concentration cease, and this can lead to so-called microsleep.
answerASource: Fatigue
answerBSource: Alcohol and other intoxicants
questionTextTarget: Haydashga yaroqlilikni nima buzishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Sezgi organlariga salbiy ta’sir qiladigan har qanday narsa haydash qobiliyatini kamaytirishi mumkin. Giyohvand moddalar bilan bir qatorda ayrim dorilar ham bunga kiradi, shuning uchun ularni qabul qilishdan oldin qo‘llanmani o‘qing. Qondagi alkogol miqdori 0,3 promille bo‘lganda ham siz haydashga yaroqsiz bo‘lasiz. Charchoq avariyalarning eng ko‘p uchraydigan sabablaridan biridir. Bunda diqqat va konsentratsiya susayadi va “mikrouyqu” deb ataladigan holat yuz berishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Alkogol va boshqa mast qiluvchi moddalar

questionTextSource: In general, how long does it take before an alcohol level of 1.0 per mille (100 mg/100 ml) is cleared from the blood stream?
explanationSource: The rule of thumb is: 0.1 permille is being broken down per hour. After 10 hours, 1.0 permille are completely degraded.
answerASource: 10 hours
answerBSource: 5 hours
questionTextTarget: Umuman olganda, qondagi 1,0 promille alkogol miqdori qancha vaqtda chiqib ketadi?
explanationTarget: Oddiy qoida shunday: soatiga 0,1 promille alkogol parchalanadi. 10 soatdan keyin 1,0 promille to‘liq parchalanadi.

questionTextSource: What can increase the intoxicating effect of alcohol?
explanationSource: The effect of alcohol is enhanced by medication. Especially large amounts of alcohol in combination with sleeping pills, painkillers or tranquilizers can be life-threatening. If you drink alcohol on an empty stomach or consume a large amount of alcohol in a short period of time, the alcohol enters your blood immediately: you are suddenly dead drunk.
answerASource: Sleeping pills, pain killers or sedatives
answerBSource: Drinking on an "empty" stomach
questionTextTarget: Alkogolning mast qiluvchi ta’sirini nima kuchaytirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Alkogol ta’siri dorilar bilan kuchayadi. Ayniqsa uxlatadigan dorilar, og‘riq qoldiruvchilar yoki tinchlantiruvchi dorilar bilan birga ko‘p miqdorda alkogol iste’mol qilish hayot uchun xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin. Agar alkogolni och qoringa ichsangiz yoki qisqa vaqt ichida ko‘p miqdorda ichsangiz, alkogol darhol qonga o‘tadi: siz to‘satdan juda mast bo‘lib qolasiz.
answerATarget: Uxlatadigan dorilar, og‘riq qoldiruvchilar yoki tinchlantiruvchi dorilar
answerCTarget: Spirtli ichimliklarni bir yo‘la ichib yuborish

questionTextSource: What can be the effects of even small quantities of alcohol?
explanationSource: Even small amounts of alcohol affect your central nervous system and worsen your perception: your hearing and vision, your ability to react and perform, your sense of balance. Your willingness to take risks increases, dangers are no longer recognized by you. You think you are roadworthy, even if that is not true.
answerASource: Delayed reactions
answerBSource: Reckless driving
questionTextTarget: Hatto oz miqdordagi alkogol qanday ta’sir ko‘rsatishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Hatto oz miqdordagi alkogol markaziy asab tizimiga ta’sir qiladi va idrokni yomonlashtiradi: eshitish va ko‘rish, javob berish va harakat qilish qobiliyati, muvozanat hissi pasayadi. Tavakkal qilishga moyillik ortadi, xavflar endi tan olinmaydi. Aslida unday bo‘lmasa ham, o‘zingizni haydashga yaroqli deb o‘ylaysiz.

questionTextSource: What effects can drugs have?
explanationSource: Drug substances affect the central nervous system and distort sensory perception. Although you will feel more efficient under the influence of drugs, your real performance will be reduced and makes you unable to drive. Compared to other intoxicants, drugs are more addictive.
answerASource: Intoxication
answerBSource: Dependence, addiction
answerCSource: Prolonged improvement in physical and mental capabilities
questionTextTarget: Giyohvand moddalar qanday ta’sir ko‘rsatishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Giyohvand moddalar markaziy asab tizimiga ta’sir qiladi va sezgi idrokini buzadi. Giyohvand modda ta’sirida o‘zingizni samaraliroq his qilishingiz mumkin, ammo haqiqiy ish qobiliyatingiz pasayadi va siz haydashga yaroqsiz bo‘lib qolasiz. Boshqa mast qiluvchi moddalarga qaraganda, giyohvand moddalar ko‘proq qaramlik keltirib chiqaradi.
answerCTarget: Jismoniy va ruhiy qobiliyatlarning uzoq muddatli yaxshilanishi

questionTextSource: Which drugs can make a person temporarily unfit to drive even when consumed on a single occasion?
explanationSource: The use of drugs even in small quantities leads to temporary inability to drive. Unlike alcohol, there are no limits for drugs. Driving under the influence of drugs can mean the loss of your driver's license.
answerASource: Hashish, marijuana
answerBSource: Heroin, cocaine, amphetamines
questionTextTarget: Qaysi giyohvand moddalar hatto bir martalik iste’molda ham odamni vaqtincha haydashga yaroqsiz qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Giyohvand moddalarni hatto oz miqdorda iste’mol qilish ham vaqtinchalik haydashga yaroqsizlikka olib keladi. Alkogoldan farqli ravishda, giyohvand moddalar uchun ruxsat etilgan chegara yo‘q. Giyohvand modda ta’sirida haydash haydovchilik guvohnomasidan mahrum bo‘lishga olib kelishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: When is a drug-dependent person fit to drive a motor vehicle again?
explanationSource: Anyone who was caught driving under the influence of drugs had to hand in his driver's license. If he is a drug addict, the person must live drug-free for a full year before he can get back his driving license. Proof of this is given by the Appraisal Body (Ger. Begutachterstelle für Fahreignung (BfF)) in form of a report.
answerASource: After he/she can be shown to have stopped taking drugs for at least one year and is not likely to have a relapse
answerBSource: If he/she has not taken drugs for one month
answerCSource: If he/she has not taken drugs for six months
questionTextTarget: Giyohvandlikka qaram shaxs qachon yana motorli transport vositasini haydashga yaroqli bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Giyohvand modda ta’sirida haydagani aniqlangan shaxs haydovchilik guvohnomasini topshirishi kerak bo‘ladi. Agar u giyohvandlikka qaram bo‘lsa, guvohnomasini qayta olishdan oldin to‘liq bir yil davomida giyohvand moddalarsiz yashashi kerak. Buning isboti haydashga yaroqlilikni baholash organi tomonidan hisobot shaklida beriladi.
answerATarget: Kamida bir yil giyohvand moddalarni qabul qilmaganini isbotlagan va qaytalanish ehtimoli bo‘lmaganda
answerBTarget: Agar bir oy giyohvand modda qabul qilmagan bo‘lsa
answerCTarget: Agar olti oy giyohvand modda qabul qilmagan bo‘lsa

questionTextSource: How is the intoxicating substance in hashish broken down by the body?
explanationSource: Drugs such as hashish are not broken down evenly in the body - in contrast to alcohol, for example. Therefore, one cannot make a reliable prediction in this regard.
answerASource: Unevenly over an indeterminate period
answerBSource: Evenly, 0.1 per mille per hour
questionTextTarget: Hashish tarkibidagi mast qiluvchi modda tana tomonidan qanday parchalanadi?
explanationTarget: Hashish kabi giyohvand moddalar, masalan alkogoldan farqli ravishda, tanada bir tekis parchalanmaydi. Shuning uchun bu borada ishonchli taxmin qilish mumkin emas.

questionTextSource: What are the consequences for a person driving a motor vehicle under the influence of drugs (e.g. hashish, heroin, cocaine)?
explanationSource: Driving a vehicle under the influence of drugs such as hashish, cocaine or heroin may result in: withdrawal of the license, a fine and/or imprisonment. Imprisonment may amount to up to five years if other persons were endangered. In order to get your driving license back, you have to undergo a medical-psychological assessment (MPA).
answerASource: Confiscation of driving licence or driving ban
answerBSource: Fine and/or imprisonment
questionTextTarget: Giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida (masalan, hashish, geroin, kokain) motorli transport vositasini boshqarish qanday oqibatlarga olib kelishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Hashish, kokain yoki geroin kabi giyohvand moddalar ta’sirida transport vositasini boshqarish guvohnomadan mahrum bo‘lish, jarima va/yoki qamoq jazosi bilan yakunlanishi mumkin. Agar boshqa shaxslar xavf ostiga qo‘yilgan bo‘lsa, qamoq jazosi besh yilgacha bo‘lishi mumkin. Haydovchilik guvohnomasini qayta olish uchun tibbiy-psixologik tekshiruvdan o‘tish kerak bo‘ladi.
answerATarget: Haydovchilik guvohnomasining olib qo‘yilishi yoki haydash taqiqi

questionTextSource: What are the possible effects of hashish consumption?
explanationSource: The consumption of hashish leads to states of intoxication in which the feeling for time and space is lost. Attention is lowered, the perception of the environment is clearly obscured. There may be sensory illusions and states of confusion, as well as hallucinations.
answerASource: Intoxication with dangerous hallucination and reduced reaction capability
answerBSource: Intoxication with confusion and depression
questionTextTarget: Hashish iste’moli qanday ta’sir ko‘rsatishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Hashish iste’moli vaqt va makon hissi yo‘qoladigan mastlik holatiga olib keladi. Diqqat pasayadi, atrof-muhitni idrok qilish ancha xiralashadi. Sezgi illyuziyalari, chalkashlik holatlari va gallyutsinatsiyalar yuzaga kelishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Xavfli gallyutsinatsiyalar va javob berish qobiliyatining pasayishi bilan mastlik

questionTextSource: What are the possible effects of hashish consumption?
explanationSource: The use of hashish puts the user in a state of intoxication in which the ability to assess risks is lost. The feeling for time and place is lost and hallucinations as well as misperceptions can be the result. Distances and speeds can no longer be estimated correctly. The willingness to take risks as well as the tendency to misjudgments are increasing rapidly.
answerASource: Diminished awareness of danger
answerBSource: Increased likelihood of mistakes in assimilating information
questionTextTarget: Hashish iste’moli qanday ta’sir ko‘rsatishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Hashish iste’moli foydalanuvchini xavflarni baholash qobiliyati yo‘qoladigan mastlik holatiga olib keladi. Vaqt va joy hissi yo‘qoladi, gallyutsinatsiyalar hamda noto‘g‘ri idroklar yuzaga kelishi mumkin. Masofa va tezlikni endi to‘g‘ri baholab bo‘lmaydi. Tavakkal qilishga moyillik va xato baholash ehtimoli tez ortadi.
answerBTarget: Ma’lumotni qabul qilishda xato qilish ehtimolining ortishi

questionTextSource: Who is not allowed to drink alcohol when driving motor vehicles?
explanationSource: During the probation period or before the age of 21, a limit of 0.0 permille applies to you before each journey and while driving a motor vehicle: an absolute alcohol ban.
answerASource: All drivers under 21
answerBSource: All drivers during their probation period
questionTextTarget: Motorli transport vositasini boshqarayotganda kimlarga alkogol ichish taqiqlanadi?
explanationTarget: Sinov muddati davomida yoki 21 yoshga to‘lmagan bo‘lsangiz, har bir safar oldidan va motorli transport vositasini boshqarish vaqtida siz uchun 0,0 promille chegarasi amal qiladi: mutlaq alkogol taqiqi.

questionTextSource: Are drivers during their probation period allowed to be under the influence of alcohol when driving motor vehicles?
explanationSource: During the probationary period you must not drink any alcohol if you want to drive a motor vehicle. In general, you should stick to 0.0 permille when participating in traffic.
answerASource: No, definitely not
answerBSource: Yes, up to a blood alcohol level of 50 milligrams if they have not committed any alcohol related traffic violation
answerCSource: Yes, up to a blood alcohol level of 30 milligrams if they have not committed any alcohol related traffic violation
questionTextTarget: Sinov muddati davomidagi haydovchilar motorli transport vositasini boshqarayotganda alkogol ta’sirida bo‘lishi mumkinmi?
explanationTarget: Sinov muddati davomida motorli transport vositasini boshqarmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, hech qanday alkogol ichmasligingiz kerak. Umuman olganda, yo‘l harakatida qatnashayotganda 0,0 promillega rioya qilgan ma’qul.
answerBTarget: Ha, agar alkogol bilan bog‘liq yo‘l harakati qoidabuzarligi qilmagan bo‘lsa, 50 milligrammgacha qondagi alkogol darajasida
answerCTarget: Ha, agar alkogol bilan bog‘liq yo‘l harakati qoidabuzarligi qilmagan bo‘lsa, 30 milligrammgacha qondagi alkogol darajasida

questionTextSource: Why can fitness to drive be impaired even by just a small quantity of alcohol?
explanationSource: Even small amounts of alcohol have a negative effect on vision, responsiveness and perception. The willingness for hasty actions increases and the estimation of distances as well as attention declines.
answerASource: Because this reduces the field of vision
answerBSource: Because this diminishes spatial vision
answerCSource: Because this reduces the reaction time
questionTextTarget: Nega oz miqdordagi alkogol ham haydashga yaroqlilikni buzishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Hatto oz miqdordagi alkogol ham ko‘rish, javob qaytarish va idrokka salbiy ta’sir qiladi. Shoshma-shosharlik bilan harakat qilishga moyillik ortadi, masofani baholash va diqqat pasayadi.

questionTextSource: How can the consumption of cannabis products affect driving performance?
explanationSource: The consumption of cannabis products is counterproductive to the ability to drive. Regardless of individually different manner of reactions and behaviors after consumption, the ability to focus on traffic generally decreases while the sensitivity to glare increases.
answerASource: The awareness of other traffic decreases
answerBSource: Concentration on driving decreases
questionTextTarget: Kannabis mahsulotlari iste’moli haydash qobiliyatiga qanday ta’sir qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Kannabis mahsulotlarini iste’mol qilish haydash qobiliyatiga salbiy ta’sir qiladi. Iste’moldan keyingi individual reaksiyalar va xatti-harakatlar har xil bo‘lsa ham, odatda yo‘l harakatiga diqqat kamayadi, yorug‘likdan ko‘r bo‘lishga sezgirlik esa ortadi.

questionTextSource: Why is consuming drugs even just once, dangerous for driving on public roads?
explanationSource: Drugs usually cause perceptual disorders. Even the one-time use of drugs can lead to a high lasting several hours. You as a consumer would be unfit to drive.
answerASource: - can result in my unfitness to drive
answerBSource: - can result in an intoxication state lasting for several hours
questionTextTarget: Nega giyohvand moddani hatto bir marta iste’mol qilish ham jamoat yo‘llarida haydash uchun xavfli?
explanationTarget: Giyohvand moddalar odatda idrok buzilishlariga olib keladi. Hatto bir martalik iste’mol ham bir necha soat davom etadigan mastlik holatiga olib kelishi mumkin. Iste’molchi sifatida siz haydashga yaroqsiz bo‘lasiz.
answerATarget: - mening haydashga yaroqsiz bo‘lishimga olib kelishi mumkin
answerBTarget: - bir necha soat davom etadigan mastlik holatiga olib kelishi mumkin

questionTextSource: How long does cannabis and its degradation products remain detectable in urine?
explanationSource: Cannabis and its breakdown products are traceable in your urine for a period between ten days and three months after consumption. The exact amount of time depends on the consumption frequency and the accuracy of the test.
answerASource: For some weeks
answerBSource: Several days at most
questionTextTarget: Kannabis va uning parchalanish mahsulotlari siydikda qancha vaqt aniqlanishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Kannabis va uning parchalanish mahsulotlari iste’moldan keyin o‘n kundan uch oygacha siydikda aniqlanishi mumkin. Aniq muddat iste’mol qilish tez-tezligiga va testning aniqligiga bog‘liq.

questionTextSource: Why is an individual unfit to drive after consuming the drug crystal meth?
explanationSource: "Crystal Meth" has a negative effect on the driving ability for the following reasons: The drug causes delusions. It caters the overestimation of one's own performance and sudden exhaustion. Even the consumption of small amounts makes you unfit for driving.
answerASource: Because of the possibility of experiencing hallucinations
answerBSource: Because it is possible to over-estimate personal capabilities
answerCSource: Because of the possible sudden onset of fatigue
questionTextTarget: Crystal meth giyohvand moddasini iste’mol qilgandan keyin odam nega haydashga yaroqsiz bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: “Crystal Meth” haydash qobiliyatiga quyidagi sabablarga ko‘ra salbiy ta’sir qiladi: u alahlash va gallyutsinatsiyalarni keltirib chiqaradi, o‘z imkoniyatlarini ortiqcha baholashga va to‘satdan holdan toyishga olib keladi. Hatto oz miqdorda iste’mol qilish ham sizni haydashga yaroqsiz qiladi.
answerBTarget: Shaxsiy qobiliyatlarni ortiqcha baholash mumkinligi sabab

questionTextSource: How can your fitness to drive be quickly restored following the excessive consumption of alcohol?
explanationSource: As alcohol degrades very slowly in the body, nothing can restore your driving ability in the short term.
answerASource: Nothing can achieve this
answerBSource: By drinking two cups of coffee
questionTextTarget: Ko‘p miqdorda alkogol iste’mol qilingandan keyin haydashga yaroqlilikni qanday tez tiklash mumkin?
explanationTarget: Alkogol tanada juda sekin parchalanadi, shuning uchun qisqa muddatda haydash qobiliyatingizni hech narsa tiklay olmaydi.

questionTextSource: What can affect ability to drive in a similar way to alcohol?
explanationSource: Alcohol, drugs and medication have a negative effect on our reaction time, inhibition and motor skills.
answerASource: Medications
answerBSource: Drugs
questionTextTarget: Nima haydash qobiliyatiga alkogolga o‘xshash tarzda ta’sir qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Alkogol, giyohvand moddalar va dorilar reaksiya vaqti, o‘zini nazorat qilish hamda harakat ko‘nikmalariga salbiy ta’sir qiladi.

questionTextSource: How can the consumption of cannabis products affect the driver?
explanationSource: After cannabis use, your perception is clouded and your ability to concentrate decreases.
answerASource: It reduces the awareness of other traffic
answerBSource: It reduces the ability to concentrate on driving
questionTextTarget: Kannabis mahsulotlari iste’moli haydovchiga qanday ta’sir qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Kannabis iste’molidan keyin idrokingiz xiralashadi va diqqatni jamlash qobiliyatingiz pasayadi.

questionTextSource: What effects can result from taking drugs?
explanationSource:
Drugs lead to noise. This also changes the perception of a person. These intoxicating states can cause various impairments, such as the impairment of the concentration and an incorrect assessment of the speed.
Furthermore, there may be an increase in the risk of risk, since it is very common to misjudge critical situations or your own driving ability.
answerASource: Impairment of concentration
answerBSource: Increased readiness to take risks
questionTextTarget: Giyohvand moddalarni qabul qilish qanday ta’sirlarga olib kelishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Giyohvand moddalar mastlik holatini keltirib chiqaradi va inson idrokini o‘zgartiradi. Bunday mastlik holatlari turli buzilishlarga, masalan diqqatning pasayishi va tezlikni noto‘g‘ri baholashga olib kelishi mumkin. Bundan tashqari, xavfga tayyorlik ortishi mumkin, chunki odam ko‘pincha xavfli vaziyatlarni yoki o‘z haydash qobiliyatini noto‘g‘ri baholaydi.

questionTextSource: Consuming what substance before or while driving, can make you unfit to drive?
explanationSource:
For all drugs and substances listed here, consumption will lead to driving inability.
Drugs and alcohol at the wheel lead to a significant risk to road traffic because they significantly restrict attention and concentration. In addition, taking alcohol and drugs can have numerous physical and psychological effects, as can the misjudgments of critical situations or the overestimation of one's own driving ability.
answerASource: Cocaine
answerBSource: Alcohol
questionTextTarget: Haydashdan oldin yoki haydash vaqtida qaysi moddani iste’mol qilish sizni haydashga yaroqsiz qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Bu yerda sanab o‘tilgan barcha giyohvand va mast qiluvchi moddalar iste’moli haydashga yaroqsizlikka olib keladi. Rulda giyohvand modda va alkogol yo‘l harakati uchun katta xavf tug‘diradi, chunki ular diqqat va konsentratsiyani ancha cheklaydi. Bundan tashqari, alkogol va giyohvand moddalar ko‘plab jismoniy va ruhiy ta’sirlarga, shuningdek xavfli vaziyatlarni noto‘g‘ri baholash yoki o‘z haydash qobiliyatini ortiqcha baholashga olib kelishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: When ambient temperatures are high, this negatively affects driver concentration during long journeys and accident numbers rise. Which of the following is it advisable to do, so that you remain alert and can drive safely, even during high summer?
explanationSource: When temperatures are high, make sure you drink enough water and take regular breaks to exercise.
answerASource: I plan for regular breaks
answerBSource: I drink enough
answerCSource: I try to perform my trips around noon
questionTextTarget: Havo harorati yuqori bo‘lganda uzoq safarlarda haydovchi diqqatiga salbiy ta’sir qiladi va avariyalar soni ortadi. Yozning jazirama paytida ham hushyor qolish va xavfsiz haydash uchun nimalar tavsiya etiladi?
explanationTarget: Harorat yuqori bo‘lganda yetarlicha suv iching va muntazam tanaffuslar qilib, harakat qiling.
answerCTarget: Safarlarimni tush paytiga to‘g‘rilashga harakat qilaman

questionTextSource: You should refrain from driving any vehicle if you are experiencing what physical symptoms?
explanationSource:
If you feel ill, you should take a break or let other people drive to ensure the safety of all road users.
Dizziness, nausea and fever affect your concentration and your ability to drive, so wait until you feel better to avoid endangering yourself and other road users.
answerASource: Nausea
answerBSource: Dizziness
questionTextTarget: Qaysi jismoniy alomatlar bo‘lsa, transport vositasini boshqarishdan voz kechish kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar o‘zingizni yomon his qilsangiz, barcha yo‘l harakati ishtirokchilari xavfsizligi uchun tanaffus qiling yoki boshqaga haydatib qo‘ying. Bosh aylanishi, ko‘ngil aynishi va isitma diqqat va haydash qobiliyatiga ta’sir qiladi, shuning uchun o‘zingizni yaxshi his qilguncha kuting.

questionTextSource: Participation in road traffic requires caution at all times and consideration towards other road users. What does this mean for you?
explanationSource: Always count on the mistakes of others as well as your own. Stick to an anticipatory driving style at all times and do not insist on your right of way in any case. This would violate the principles of traffic regulations and endanger other road users.
answerASource: - reckon with improper conduct on the part of others
answerBSource: - drive with foresight
answerCSource: - insist on your right of priority at all times
questionTextTarget: Yo‘l harakatida qatnashish har doim ehtiyotkorlik va boshqa harakat ishtirokchilariga hurmat bilan munosabatni talab qiladi. Bu siz uchun nimani anglatadi?
explanationTarget: Har doim boshqalarning ham, o‘zingizning ham xatolaringizni hisobga oling. Doim oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydash uslubiga rioya qiling va har qanday holatda ham ustunlik huquqingizni talab qilmang. Bu yo‘l harakati qoidalarining asosiy tamoyillarini buzadi va boshqa harakat ishtirokchilarini xavf ostiga qo‘yadi.
answerCTarget: - har doim ustunlik huquqingizni talab qilish

questionTextSource: To which road users must you show particular care?
explanationSource: You must be particularly careful towards the following road users: all those who are not or are no longer able to cope with the demands of road traffic. This means that the principle of trust is abolished, due diligence towards children, elderly and/or frail people, disabled or drunk cyclists is up to you.
answerASource: To persons with obvious disabilities
answerBSource: To children
questionTextTarget: Qaysi yo‘l harakati ishtirokchilariga alohida ehtiyotkorlik ko‘rsatishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Quyidagi yo‘l harakati ishtirokchilariga ayniqsa ehtiyotkor bo‘lishingiz kerak: yo‘l harakati talablarini bajara olmaydigan yoki endi bajara olmaydigan barcha shaxslar. Bu ishonch tamoyili bekor bo‘lishini bildiradi; bolalar, keksalar va/yoki zaif odamlar, nogironlar yoki mast velosipedchilarga nisbatan alohida ehtiyotkorlik sizning zimmangizda.

questionTextSource: When may you use the right-hand hard shoulder?
explanationSource: The right side strip may be used in the following cases: 1. for holding and parking, 2. for slow moving vehicles such as mopeds or agricultural tractors and machinery. These should use the right side strip to avoid traffic obstructions and traffic jams. The side strip must be attached and have a sufficient width. It is forbidden in any case to use the side strip for overtaking.
answerASource: For stopping and parking
answerBSource: For driving a slow-moving vehicle
questionTextTarget: Qachon o‘ng tomondagi yo‘l cheti yo‘lagidan foydalanishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: O‘ng tomondagi chet yo‘lakdan quyidagi hollarda foydalanish mumkin: 1. to‘xtash va parkovka qilish uchun; 2. mopedlar yoki qishloq xo‘jaligi traktorlari va texnikasi kabi sekin harakatlanuvchi transport vositalari uchun. Ular harakatga xalaqit va tirbandlikni oldini olish uchun o‘ng chet yo‘lakdan foydalanishi kerak. Chet yo‘lak mustahkamlangan va yetarli kenglikda bo‘lishi kerak. Har qanday holatda ham chet yo‘lakdan quvib o‘tish uchun foydalanish taqiqlanadi.
answerBTarget: Sekin harakatlanuvchi transport vositasini boshqarish uchun

questionTextSource: You have manoeuvred into the left lane by mistake, but would like to take a right turn. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: With a solid line as a road edge marking, you must under no circumstances turn right. Rather, you must stay in your lane and continue straight or turn left.
answerASource: I continue driving straight ahead or turn left
answerBSource: I move carefully into the right-hand lane
answerCSource: I drive straight ahead and turn right at the intersection
questionTextTarget: Siz adashib chap yo‘lakka chiqib oldingiz, ammo o‘ngga burilmoqchisiz. To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l cheti belgisi sifatidagi uzluksiz chiziq bo‘lsa, hech qanday holatda o‘ngga burilishingiz mumkin emas. Aksincha, o‘z yo‘lagizda qolib, to‘g‘ri davom etishingiz yoki chapga burilishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: To‘g‘ri harakatni davom ettiraman yoki chapga burilaman

questionTextSource: When driving on main roads, which vehicles must use the hard shoulders where possible?
explanationSource: Slow-moving vehicles such as tractors, mopeds must use the hard shoulder. Other vehicles that go faster than 45km/h need to remain on the road
answerASource: Slow-moving agricultural tractors and machinery
answerBSource: Mopeds
questionTextTarget: Asosiy yo‘llarda qaysi transport vositalari imkon qadar yo‘l cheti yo‘lagidan foydalanishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Traktorlar va mopedlar kabi sekin harakatlanuvchi transport vositalari yo‘l cheti yo‘lagidan foydalanishi kerak. 45 km/soatdan tezroq yura oladigan boshqa transport vositalari yo‘lda qolishi kerak.
answerATarget: Sekin harakatlanuvchi qishloq xo‘jaligi traktorlari va texnikasi

questionTextSource: What should you do in this situation?
explanationSource: In a street where vehicles park on both sides, the range of movement is limited. With only one lane, vehicles are equally important in both directions. Nevertheless, you should drive into a gap here to let an oncoming vehicle pass.
answerASource: - into the gap to allow the oncoming vehicle to drive past
answerBSource: - onwards, because the oncoming vehicle has to reverse
answerCSource: - backwards, because the oncoming vehicle has right of way
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Ikki tomonda ham avtomobillar parkovka qilingan ko‘chada harakat maydoni cheklangan bo‘ladi. Faqat bitta yo‘lak bo‘lsa, har ikki yo‘nalishdagi transportlar teng ahamiyatga ega. Shunga qaramay, bu yerda qarshidan kelayotgan transportni o‘tkazish uchun bo‘sh joyga kirishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: - qarshidan kelayotgan transport o‘tib ketishi uchun bo‘sh joyga kiraman
answerBTarget: - davom etaman, chunki qarshidan kelayotgan transport orqaga qaytishi kerak
answerCTarget: - orqaga yuraman, chunki qarshidan kelayotgan transport ustunlikka ega

questionTextSource: A horse-drawn carriage is coming towards you. What should you do?
explanationSource: Drive as far to the right as possible when you encounter a horse-drawn carriage. Do not honk and do not drive at high motor speed. The animals could be sensitive to noise and be frightened. It might happen that they break out and run on your side of the road.
answerASource: - Avoid making noise
answerBSource: - drive as far to the right as possible
questionTextTarget: Sizga ot aravasi qarab kelmoqda. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Ot aravasi bilan ro‘baro‘ kelganda imkon qadar o‘ngga yaqin yuring. Signal chalmang va dvigatelni yuqori aylanishda ishlatmang. Hayvonlar shovqinga sezgir bo‘lib, cho‘chib ketishi mumkin. Ular chiqib ketib, yo‘lning siz tomoningizga o‘tib ketishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What is correct in this situation?
explanationSource: At the traffic sign "Intersection or junction with right-of-way", you must follow the right-of-way rule "right before left". This applies to the nearest intersection.
answerASource: - the "right-before-left" right-of-way rule applies
answerBSource: - I have right of way
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda qaysi javob to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: “Ustunlik qoidasi amal qiladigan chorraha yoki kesishma” belgisi bo‘lsa, “o‘ngdan kelganga yo‘l ber” qoidasi amal qiladi. Bu eng yaqin kesishmaga taalluqli.
answerATarget: - “o‘ngdan kelganga yo‘l ber” ustunlik qoidasi amal qiladi

questionTextSource: What do you have to watch out for, when crossing a priority road?
explanationSource: When crossing a priority road, you must keep in mind: 1. the width of the priority road, 2. the distance and speed of oncoming traffic, 3. the weather conditions. These are all the influences that are important for crossing the priority road. The weather influences the condition of the road and the visibility. Along with the road width, it determines how long you need to cross the priority road. By estimating the distance and the speed of oncoming traffic you can assess how much time you have available.
answerASource: - the width of the priority road
answerBSource: - the speed and the distance of the cross traffic
questionTextTarget: Ustun yo‘lni kesib o‘tayotganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Ustun yo‘lni kesib o‘tayotganda quyidagilarni hisobga olishingiz kerak: 1. ustun yo‘lning kengligi; 2. kesishayotgan transportning masofasi va tezligi; 3. ob-havo sharoiti. Bular ustun yo‘lni kesib o‘tish uchun muhim omillardir. Ob-havo yo‘l holati va ko‘rinishga ta’sir qiladi. Yo‘l kengligi bilan birga, u ustun yo‘lni kesib o‘tish uchun qancha vaqt kerakligini belgilaydi. Kesishayotgan transportning masofasi va tezligini baholab, sizda qancha vaqt borligini aniqlashingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: You are driving in a built-up area on a cycle path on which mopeds are permitted. What should you anticipate?
explanationSource: If you ride on a bike path in town, you should expect everything. Doors of parked cars can be opened suddenly, turning vehicles can overlook you and pedestrians can use the bike path.
answerASource: - the doors of parked vehicles will be suddenly opened
answerBSource: - vehicles turning into another street may not be able to see me
answerCSource: - pedestrians will walk on the cycle path
questionTextTarget: Siz aholi yashash hududida mopedlarga ruxsat berilgan veloyo‘lakda harakatlanyapsiz. Nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Shahar ichida veloyo‘lakda harakatlansangiz, hamma narsani kutishingiz kerak. Parkovka qilingan avtomobillarning eshiklari to‘satdan ochilishi, burilayotgan transport vositalari sizni ko‘rmay qolishi va piyodalar veloyo‘lakdan yurishi mumkin.
answerATarget: - parkovka qilingan transport vositalarining eshiklari to‘satdan ochiladi
answerBTarget: - boshqa ko‘chaga burilayotgan transport vositalari meni ko‘rmay qolishi mumkin

questionTextSource: Which factors lengthen your braking distance?
explanationSource: The braking distance of a vehicle is extended: 1. on a steep hill, 2. on a wet or slippery road surface, 3. if the vehicle has to carry an additional load. The reasons for the extended braking distances are: On a steep hill, acceleration force is caused by gravity. On wet or slippery roads, the static friction between tires and road surface is reduced. Additional load increases the mass that needs to come to a stop.
answerASource: Towing a trailer not fitted with brakes
answerBSource: A wet or slippery roadway
questionTextTarget: Qaysi omillar tormoz yo‘lini uzaytiradi?
explanationTarget: Transport vositasining tormoz yo‘li quyidagilarda uzayadi: 1. tik pastlikda; 2. ho‘l yoki sirpanchiq yo‘l yuzasida; 3. transport vositasi qo‘shimcha yuk tashiganda. Tormoz yo‘li uzayishining sabablari: tik pastlikda og‘irlik kuchi tezlantiruvchi ta’sir qiladi. Ho‘l yoki sirpanchiq yo‘llarda shina bilan yo‘l yuzasi orasidagi ilashish kamayadi. Qo‘shimcha yuk to‘xtatilishi kerak bo‘lgan massani oshiradi.

questionTextSource: What does the braking distance depend on?
explanationSource: The braking distance of your vehicle depends on the tires, the brake system and the condition of the road. Braking forces are generated powerfully and quickly by a functioning brake system and are optimally transmitted to the roadway only if there is sufficient tread. The static friction of the tires depends on the road condition.
answerASource: - tyres
answerBSource: - braking system
questionTextTarget: Tormoz yo‘li nimaga bog‘liq?
explanationTarget: Transport vositangizning tormoz yo‘li shinalarga, tormoz tizimiga va yo‘l holatiga bog‘liq. Ishlaydigan tormoz tizimi tormoz kuchlarini kuchli va tez hosil qiladi, ammo ular yo‘lga faqat protektor yetarli bo‘lsa optimal uzatiladi. Shinalarning yo‘lga ilashishi yo‘l holatiga bog‘liq.

questionTextSource: What must you take into consideration when selecting your speed?
explanationSource: You are only allowed to drive your vehicle at maximum legal speed. The actual permissible speed is usually lower. It depends on the visibility and weather conditions, the road conditions, the current traffic conditions and your personal driving skills.
answerASource: Visibility and weather conditions
answerBSource: The condition of the road and traffic conditions
questionTextTarget: Tezlikni tanlashda nimani hisobga olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz transport vositangizni faqat qonuniy maksimal tezlikkacha haydashingiz mumkin. Amalda ruxsat etilgan tezlik odatda undan past bo‘ladi. Bu ko‘rinish va ob-havo sharoitiga, yo‘l holatiga, joriy harakat sharoitiga va shaxsiy haydash mahoratingizga bog‘liq.

questionTextSource: By which rule of thumb can you determine from the speed the distance in metres a motor vehicle travels in one second?
explanationSource: With the following rule of thumb and the help of speed, you can calculate the distance in meters that a vehicle travels in a second: Divide the speed by ten and multiply the result by three. If you drive your vehicle at 100 km/h, you can travel 30 meters in one second.
answerASource: {Speed in km/h}/{10} x 3
answerBSource: {Speed in km/h}/{10} x 5
questionTextTarget: Tezlikdan kelib chiqib, motorli transport vositasi bir soniyada necha metr yurishini qaysi oddiy qoida bilan aniqlash mumkin?
explanationTarget: Quyidagi oddiy qoida yordamida tezlikdan transport vositasi bir soniyada necha metr yurishini hisoblash mumkin: tezlikni o‘nga bo‘ling va natijani uchga ko‘paytiring. Agar 100 km/soat tezlikda yursangiz, bir soniyada 30 metr bosib o‘tasiz.

questionTextSource: By which rule of thumb can you determine the braking distance in metres from speed when braking normally?
explanationSource: The braking distance is the distance you travel from the start of braking until your vehicle stands. It can be calculated from a simple rule of thumb during normal braking: the speed traveled divided by ten times the speed traveled divided by ten.
answerASource: {Speed in km/h}/{10} x {Speed in km/h}/{10}
answerBSource: {Speed in km/h}/{10} x 5
questionTextTarget: Oddiy tormozlashda tezlikdan kelib chiqib tormoz yo‘lini metrda qaysi qoida bilan aniqlash mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tormoz yo‘li — tormozlash boshlanganidan transport vositangiz to‘liq to‘xtaguncha bosib o‘tiladigan masofa. Oddiy tormozlashda uni oddiy qoida bilan hisoblash mumkin: tezlikni o‘nga bo‘lib, olingan natijani yana o‘sha natijaga ko‘paytiring.

questionTextSource: You are travelling at 30 km/h. According to the rule of thumb, the braking distance is 9 metres when braking normally. How long is the braking distance under the same conditions when travelling at 60 km/h?
explanationSource: If you double your speed to 60 km/h, the braking distance will quadruple. Just proceed from the braking distance for 30 km/h and accordingly calculate 9 m times 4 = 36 m.
questionTextTarget: Siz 30 km/soat tezlikda ketyapsiz. Oddiy qoida bo‘yicha oddiy tormozlashda tormoz yo‘li 9 metr. Xuddi shu sharoitda 60 km/soat tezlikda tormoz yo‘li qancha bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Agar tezlikni 60 km/soatga ikki baravar oshirsangiz, tormoz yo‘li to‘rt baravar uzayadi. 30 km/soat uchun tormoz yo‘lidan kelib chiqib hisoblang: 9 m x 4 = 36 m.

questionTextSource: You are driving on a wide road on which oncoming traffic can pass by you, unobstructed. Within what distance must you be able to stop in any event?
explanationSource: You must be able to stop within the distance you can see in case obstacles such as animals or people suddenly enter the carriageway.
answerASource: - the distance readily visible to me
answerBSource: - half the distance readily visible to me
answerCSource: - twice the distance readily visible to me
questionTextTarget: Siz qarshidan kelayotgan transport sizdan to‘siqsiz o‘ta oladigan keng yo‘lda ketyapsiz. Har qanday holatda qaysi masofada to‘xtay olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Hayvonlar yoki odamlar to‘satdan qatnov qismiga chiqib qolsa, siz ko‘ra oladigan masofa ichida to‘xtay olishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: - menga aniq ko‘rinadigan masofaning ikki baravarida

questionTextSource: What does the distance to be maintained from the vehicle ahead depend on?
explanationSource: The distance to the vehicle in front depends on the speed as well as the visibility and road conditions. As a rule of thumb, you should keep at least a distance of half of your speed in meters. In poor visibility or road conditions, the distance should be increased.
answerASource: Visibility conditions
answerBSource: Speed
questionTextTarget: Oldingizdagi transport vositasigacha saqlanishi kerak bo‘lgan masofa nimaga bog‘liq?
explanationTarget: Oldingi transport vositasigacha bo‘lgan masofa tezlikka, ko‘rinish va yo‘l sharoitlariga bog‘liq. Oddiy qoida bo‘yicha, metrda kamida tezligingizning yarmi miqdorida masofa saqlashingiz kerak. Ko‘rinish yoki yo‘l sharoiti yomon bo‘lsa, masofani oshirish kerak.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: If a driver in front of you suddenly intervenes and reduces the safety distance between him and your vehicle, you must brake until the distance is guaranteed again.
answerASource: I brake
answerBSource: I increase my distance to the vehicle in front moving into my lane
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Agar oldingizdagi haydovchi to‘satdan sizning yo‘lagizga kirib, o‘zingiz bilan uning orasidagi xavfsiz masofani kamaytirsa, masofa yana ta’minlanguncha tormoz berishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Yo‘lagimga kirgan oldimdagi transport vositasigacha masofani oshiraman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: If you are overtaken by a car, you must not increase your pace. On the contrary, you should slow down to let the overtaking car recoil as fast as possible.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I maintain my speed
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Agar avtomobil sizni quvib o‘tayotgan bo‘lsa, tezlikni oshirmasligingiz kerak. Aksincha, quvib o‘tayotgan avtomobil tezroq o‘z yo‘lagiga qaytishi uchun tezlikni kamaytirishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What benefit can be obtained by maintaining an adequate distance between you and the vehicle ahead?
explanationSource: You should always maintain a sufficiently large safety distance to the car in front of you. Through anticipatory driving, you maintain optimal visibility and reduce the risk of accidents.
answerASource: It aids far-sighted driving
answerBSource: It helps reduce the risk of accidents
questionTextTarget: Oldingizdagi transport vositasi bilan yetarli masofa saqlash qanday foyda beradi?
explanationTarget: Oldingizdagi avtomobilgacha doimo yetarlicha katta xavfsiz masofa saqlashingiz kerak. Oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydash orqali optimal ko‘rinishni saqlaysiz va avariya xavfini kamaytirasiz.
answerATarget: Bu oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydashga yordam beradi
answerBTarget: Bu avariya xavfini kamaytirishga yordam beradi

questionTextSource: Where is overtaking prohibited?
explanationSource: Overtaking is prohibited in the following cases: 1. in the event of an unclear traffic situation; 2. in the event of violation of traffic regulations. In one-way streets, however, there is no general rule of no overtaking. Before you start the overtaking process, look back in the mirror and over your shoulder to make sure you are not hindering or jeopardizing other road users.
answerASource: When the traffic situation is not clear
answerBSource: Where oncoming traffic could be obstructed
questionTextTarget: Qayerda quvib o‘tish taqiqlanadi?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tish quyidagi hollarda taqiqlanadi: 1. harakat vaziyati noaniq bo‘lganda; 2. yo‘l harakati qoidalari buzilganda. Bir tomonlama ko‘chalarda esa quvib o‘tishning umumiy taqiqi yo‘q. Quvib o‘tishni boshlashdan oldin ko‘zgu va yelka oshirib qarash orqali boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xalaqit bermayotganingiz yoki xavf tug‘dirmayotganingizga ishonch hosil qiling.
answerBTarget: Qarama-qarshi transportga xalaqit berilishi mumkin bo‘lgan joyda

questionTextSource: What is the correct procedure for pulling out to overtake?
explanationSource: For pulling out when overtaking the following rules apply: You need to convince yourself with a look in the mirror and a glance over the shoulder that your overtaking maneuver will neither jeopardize nor hinder subsequent traffic. Only then you are allowed to indicate and pull out. During the overtaking process you must take care not to hinder oncoming traffic. If the driver in front of you is flashing to the right, you should not be tempted to overtake.
answerASource: There is no danger to the traffic behind
answerBSource: Oncoming traffic is not endangered
answerCSource: The vehicle in front indicates right
questionTextTarget: Quvib o‘tish uchun yo‘lakdan chiqishda to‘g‘ri tartib qanday?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tish uchun yo‘lakdan chiqishda quyidagi qoidalar amal qiladi: ko‘zguga qarab va yelka oshirib qarab, quvib o‘tish manevringiz ortingizdagi transportga xavf tug‘dirmasligi va xalaqit bermasligiga ishonch hosil qilishingiz kerak. Shundan keyingina burilish chirog‘ini yoqib, yo‘lakdan chiqishingiz mumkin. Quvib o‘tish jarayonida qarama-qarshi transportga xalaqit bermasligingiz kerak. Oldingizdagi haydovchi o‘ngga signal bersa, bu sizni quvib o‘tishga undamasligi kerak.
answerCTarget: Oldindagi transport vositasi o‘ngga signal beradi

questionTextSource: What must you do to end an overtaking manoeuvre?
explanationSource: As an overtaking driver, you must merge right as soon as possible. However, do not go back into the lane as long as you're still too close to the driver you just overtook, as you may obstruct or even endanger him. Use the turn signal in good time before starting to pull out and merging back into the lane again.
answerASource: Move over to the right as soon as possible without inconveniencing the vehicle you have overtaken
answerBSource: Signal your intention to draw in clearly and in good time
answerCSource: Move over to the right-hand side of the roadway right in front of the vehicle you have overtaken
questionTextTarget: Quvib o‘tish manevrini yakunlash uchun nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tayotgan haydovchi sifatida imkon qadar tezroq o‘ngga qaytishingiz kerak. Biroq hali quvib o‘tgan haydovchiga juda yaqin bo‘lsangiz, yo‘lakka qaytmang, chunki unga xalaqit berishingiz yoki xavf tug‘dirishingiz mumkin. Yo‘lakdan chiqish va qayta kirishdan oldin burilish chirog‘ini o‘z vaqtida yoqing.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tgan transport vositasiga xalaqit bermasdan imkon qadar tezroq o‘ngga qayting
answerBTarget: Qayta yo‘lakka kirish niyatingizni aniq va o‘z vaqtida signal bilan bildiring
answerCTarget: Quvib o‘tgan transport vositasining darhol oldidan yo‘lning o‘ng tomoniga qayting

questionTextSource: What are the regulations governing speed when overtaking?
explanationSource: You may only overtake a vehicle in front of you if you are significantly (at least 20 km/h) faster. Also, when overtaking: Do not exceed the maximum speed limit. The one who is being overtaken must not increase its initial speed during the maneuver.
answerASource: The speed of the overtaking vehicle must be appreciably higher
answerBSource: The permissible top speed must not be exceeded
answerCSource: The person being overtaken must not increase his speed
questionTextTarget: Quvib o‘tishda tezlik bo‘yicha qanday qoidalar amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Oldingizdagi transport vositasini faqat siz sezilarli darajada, ya’ni kamida 20 km/soat tezroq bo‘lsangiz quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin. Shuningdek, quvib o‘tishda maksimal ruxsat etilgan tezlikdan oshmang. Quvib o‘tilayotgan haydovchi manevr davomida o‘z tezligini oshirmasligi kerak.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tayotgan transport vositasining tezligi ancha yuqori bo‘lishi kerak
answerBTarget: Ruxsat etilgan maksimal tezlikdan oshmaslik kerak
answerCTarget: Quvib o‘tilayotgan shaxs tezligini oshirmasligi kerak

questionTextSource: What must you do when you are being overtaken?
explanationSource: Drive as far to the right as possible so as not to jeopardize the oncoming traffic and overtaking vehicle. During the entire overtaking process, you, as the one who is being overtaken, must not increase the speed, as otherwise safe overtaking would not be possible.
answerASource: If possible, drive on the far right
answerBSource: Not increase your speed
questionTextTarget: Sizni quvib o‘tishayotgan bo‘lsa, nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qarama-qarshi transport va quvib o‘tayotgan transport vositasiga xavf tug‘dirmaslik uchun imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yuring. Butun quvib o‘tish jarayonida siz, quvib o‘tilayotgan shaxs sifatida, tezlikni oshirmasligingiz kerak, aks holda xavfsiz quvib o‘tish imkonsiz bo‘ladi.
answerATarget: Imkon bo‘lsa, eng o‘ng tomonda yuring

questionTextSource: On which side must you overtake a tram which is travelling in the middle of the roadway (not a one-way street)?
explanationSource: Trams must in general be overtaken on the right. If vehicles are parked here, you have to drive behind the tram. If the rails are too far to the right, trams may also be overtaken on the left.
answerASource: On the right
answerBSource: On the left
answerCSource: On the left only if other vehicles are blocking the roadway on the right
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lning o‘rtasida harakatlanayotgan tramvayni qaysi tomondan quvib o‘tish kerak (bir tomonlama ko‘cha emas)?
explanationTarget: Tramvaylar odatda o‘ng tomondan quvib o‘tiladi. Agar bu yerda transport vositalari parkovka qilingan bo‘lsa, tramvay ortidan yurishingiz kerak. Agar relslar juda o‘ng tomonda joylashgan bo‘lsa, tramvayni chap tomondan ham quvib o‘tish mumkin.
answerCTarget: Faqat o‘ng tomondagi yo‘lni boshqa transport vositalari to‘sib turgan bo‘lsa, chap tomondan

questionTextSource: When may a tram be overtaken on the left?
explanationSource: Rail vehicles such as trams may basically only be overtaken on the right. For once, you can overtake on the left when the rails are too far to the right or when the rail vehicle is traveling in a one-way street. The right-hand traffic obstructing vehicles are not a sufficient reason to overtake rail vehicles on the left.
answerASource: In one-way streets
answerBSource: When the rails run too far to the right
answerCSource: When the roadway (not a one-way street) to the right of the tram is blocked by other vehicles
questionTextTarget: Qachon tramvayni chap tomondan quvib o‘tish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tramvay kabi relsli transport vositalari odatda faqat o‘ng tomondan quvib o‘tiladi. Istisno tariqasida, relslar juda o‘ng tomonda bo‘lsa yoki relsli transport bir tomonlama ko‘chada harakatlansa, chap tomondan quvib o‘tish mumkin. O‘ng tomondagi yo‘lni to‘sib turgan transport vositalari relsli transportni chap tomondan quvib o‘tish uchun yetarli sabab emas.
answerCTarget: Tramvayning o‘ng tomonidagi yo‘l (bir tomonlama ko‘cha emas) boshqa transport vositalari bilan to‘silgan bo‘lsa

questionTextSource: Which vehicles may be overtaken only by maintaining a specially great lateral distance?
explanationSource: When overtaking you must always keep sufficient distance to the road users next to you. This must be particularly large with motorcycle and bicycle riders. Single lane vehicles are more unstable and can sway. The lateral minimum distance to two-wheeled vehicles is 1.5 meters.
answerASource: Bicycles
answerBSource: Motorcycles
questionTextTarget: Qaysi transport vositalarini faqat ayniqsa katta yon masofa saqlagan holda quvib o‘tish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tishda yoningizdagi yo‘l ishtirokchilarigacha har doim yetarli masofa saqlashingiz kerak. Mototsiklchilar va velosipedchilarga nisbatan bu masofa ayniqsa katta bo‘lishi kerak. Bir izli transport vositalari beqarorroq bo‘ladi va tebranishi mumkin. Ikki g‘ildirakli transport vositalarigacha minimal yon masofa 1,5 metr.

questionTextSource: When must you signal?
explanationSource: Whenever you want to make a lane change or turn, you need to indicate. This also applies when following a turning priority road, but not when you leave the priority road straight ahead. Even if the direction indicator is set: always make sure that you do not endanger anyone when pulling out or going back into a lane.
answerASource: Before pulling out to overtake or to pass
answerBSource: Before pulling in again after overtaking
answerCSource: When proceeding straight ahead as you leave a priority road which bends sharply
questionTextTarget: Qachon signal berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lakni almashtirmoqchi yoki burilmoqchi bo‘lganingizda har doim burilish ko‘rsatkichini yoqishingiz kerak. Bu ustun yo‘l burilsa, unga ergashayotganingizda ham amal qiladi, lekin ustun yo‘ldan to‘g‘ri chiqib ketayotganingizda emas. Burilish ko‘rsatkichi yoqilgan bo‘lsa ham, yo‘lakdan chiqayotganda yoki qayta kirayotganda hech kimga xavf tug‘dirmayotganingizga doimo ishonch hosil qiling.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tish yoki chetlab o‘tish uchun yo‘lakdan chiqishdan oldin
answerBTarget: Quvib o‘tgandan keyin yana yo‘lakka kirishdan oldin
answerCTarget: Keskin buriluvchi ustun yo‘ldan to‘g‘ri chiqib ketayotganda

questionTextSource: Where is it forbidden to overtake?
explanationSource: When overtaking, you must exclude dangerous situations for other road users. It is generally forbidden to overtake on pedestrian crossings and on roads that are difficult to observe. You might see oncoming vehicles too late. You may overtake the bus on the bus lane.
answerASource: At pedestrian crossings
answerBSource: At points in the road where visibility is poor
questionTextTarget: Qayerda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tishda boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari uchun xavfli vaziyatlarni istisno qilishingiz kerak. Piyodalar o‘tish joylarida va ko‘rinishi qiyin bo‘lgan yo‘llarda quvib o‘tish odatda taqiqlanadi. Qarshidan kelayotgan transportni juda kech ko‘rishingiz mumkin. Avtobus yo‘lagidagi avtobusni quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: You are driving a slow-moving vehicle on a main road. How can you facilitate faster-moving vehicles in overtaking?
explanationSource: To allow faster vehicles to overtake you on a country road, you can dodge on a suitable side stripe, a lay by or in a rest stop. It is also possible to slow down or even stop at a suitable location.
answerASource: - onto the hard shoulder
answerBSource: - onto the parking area
questionTextTarget: Siz asosiy yo‘lda sekin harakatlanuvchi transport vositasini boshqaryapsiz. Tezroq transport vositalariga quvib o‘tishni qanday osonlashtirasiz?
explanationTarget: Qishloq yo‘lida tezroq transport vositalari sizni quvib o‘tishi uchun mos yon chiziqqa, to‘xtash maydonchasiga yoki dam olish joyiga chetlashingiz mumkin. Mos joyda sekinlashish yoki hatto to‘xtash ham mumkin.

questionTextSource: When overtaking, what do you have to observe regarding spacing?
explanationSource: When overtaking, you must ensure that you have sufficient lateral distance to other road users: at least 1 meter to cars, trucks, buses, trams. For pedestrians and cyclists, the minimum distance is 1.5 meters. When we go back into lane you must not cut in on the driver you just overtook. (Check: Is he visible in the rearview mirror?)
answerASource: Maintain an adequate space to the side, particularly between the vehicle and persons
answerBSource: To maintain an adequate space to the side between the vehicle and other road users
answerCSource: To maintain a greater side spacing towards multi-lane vehicles than towards single-lane vehicles
questionTextTarget: Quvib o‘tishda masofa bo‘yicha nimaga rioya qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tishda boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarigacha yetarli yon masofa borligiga ishonch hosil qilishingiz kerak: avtomobillar, yuk mashinalari, avtobuslar, tramvaylargacha kamida 1 metr. Piyodalar va velosipedchilargacha minimal masofa 1,5 metr. Qayta yo‘lakka kirayotganda, hozirgina quvib o‘tgan haydovchining oldini kesib kirmaslik kerak. Tekshiring: u orqa ko‘zguda ko‘rinayaptimi?
answerATarget: Yon tomonda, ayniqsa transport vositasi va odamlar orasida yetarli masofa saqlash
answerBTarget: Transport vositasi bilan boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari orasida yetarli yon masofa saqlash
answerCTarget: Ko‘p yo‘lakli transport vositalariga nisbatan bir izli transport vositalaridan ko‘ra kattaroq yon masofa saqlash

questionTextSource: How can you tell if a horse-drawn carriage wants to change direction?
explanationSource: When a horse-drawn carriage wants to change its driving direction, it can be recognized by one of the following signs: The horse-drawn carriage indicates; the coachman beckons with his arm or with a signaling disk.
answerASource: The driver extends his arm
answerBSource: A traffic paddle is displayed
questionTextTarget: Ot aravasi yo‘nalishini o‘zgartirmoqchi ekanini qanday bilish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ot aravasi harakat yo‘nalishini o‘zgartirmoqchi bo‘lsa, quyidagi belgilar orqali bilinadi: ot aravasi signal beradi; aravakash qo‘li yoki signal diski bilan ishora qiladi.

questionTextSource: You want to overtake a horse-drawn carriage on a rural road. What should you do?
explanationSource: Drive past the horses at an appropriate speed and with as much distance as possible. The animals may be frightened by sudden and loud noises such as a car horn or high engine speed, and may bolt. Therefore, avoid noise and proximity.
answerASource: - as little noise as possible
answerBSource: - the most space to the side as possible
questionTextTarget: Siz qishloq yo‘lida ot aravasini quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Otlar yonidan mos tezlikda va imkon qadar katta masofa bilan o‘ting. Signal yoki dvigatelning yuqori aylanishi kabi to‘satdan va baland tovushlar hayvonlarni cho‘chitishi va ularni qo‘zg‘atishi mumkin. Shuning uchun shovqin va yaqinlikdan saqlaning.
answerBTarget: - imkon qadar katta yon masofa bilan

questionTextSource: You want to overtake a horse-drawn carriage on a rural road. What should you do?
explanationSource: If you want to overtake a horse-drawn carriage on a country road, you must do the following: Avoid unnecessary noise such as honking or driving at high engine speeds so as not to scare the horses. Pay attention to the hand gestures of the coachman, as he can assess the behavior of his horses. Keep a safe distance.
answerASource: I maintain the most space to the side possible
answerBSource: I pay attention to the driver's hand signals
answerCSource: I overtake with a high engine speed
questionTextTarget: Siz qishloq yo‘lida ot aravasini quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar qishloq yo‘lida ot aravasini quvib o‘tmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, quyidagilarni qilishingiz kerak: otlarni cho‘chitmaslik uchun signal chalish yoki yuqori dvigatel aylanishida yurish kabi keraksiz shovqindan saqlaning. Aravakashning qo‘l ishoralariga e’tibor bering, chunki u otlarining xatti-harakatini baholay oladi. Xavfsiz masofa saqlang.
answerATarget: Imkon qadar katta yon masofa saqlayman
answerCTarget: Yuqori dvigatel aylanishi bilan quvib o‘taman

questionTextSource: You are driving a slow-moving vehicle on a rural road. A line of vehicles is forming behind you. What should you do?
explanationSource: A long queue behind a slow-moving vehicle leads to dangerous overtaking maneuvers. To make overtaking easier for the vehicles jamming behind you, reduce your speed. If the queue still does not disappear, you may need to stop on a side strip. This does not apply to highways! You must not use the hazard lights.
answerASource: I allow the vehicles behind me to overtake
answerBSource: I come to a stop at a suitable place, if this is the only way the vehicles behind me can overtake
answerCSource: I switch on my hazard lights and drive as far to the right as possible
questionTextTarget: Siz qishloq yo‘lida sekin harakatlanuvchi transport vositasini boshqaryapsiz. Ortingizda transport vositalari navbati hosil bo‘lmoqda. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Sekin transport vositasi ortida uzun navbat hosil bo‘lsa, xavfli quvib o‘tish manevrlari yuzaga keladi. Ortingizda tiqilib qolgan transport vositalariga quvib o‘tishni osonlashtirish uchun tezlikni kamaytiring. Agar navbat baribir yo‘qolmasa, yon chiziqda to‘xtashingiz kerak bo‘lishi mumkin. Bu avtomagistrallarga taalluqli emas! Avariya chiroqlaridan foydalanmasligingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Ortimdagi transport vositalariga quvib o‘tishga imkon beraman
answerBTarget: Agar ortimdagi transport vositalari faqat shunday quvib o‘ta olsa, mos joyda to‘xtayman
answerCTarget: Avariya chiroqlarini yoqib, imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yuraman

questionTextSource: You want to overtake a horse-drawn carriage on a rural road. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: When overtaking a carriage, you must pay attention to hand signals from the coachman, who may give you separate instructions. Carriages should always be overtaken at a safe distance so as not to frighten the horse.
answerASource: I look for hand signals from the driver indicating he wants to turn off
answerBSource: I maintain a sufficient amount of distance when pulling in again
answerCSource: I maintain the smallest possible side clearance
questionTextTarget: Siz qishloq yo‘lida ot aravasini quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Aravani quvib o‘tayotganda aravakashning qo‘l ishoralariga e’tibor berishingiz kerak, u sizga alohida ko‘rsatma berishi mumkin. Otni cho‘chitmaslik uchun aravalarni doimo xavfsiz masofa bilan quvib o‘tish kerak.
answerATarget: Haydovchining burilmoqchi ekanini bildiruvchi qo‘l ishoralariga qarayman
answerBTarget: Qayta yo‘lakka kirayotganda yetarli masofa saqlayman
answerCTarget: Imkon qadar eng kichik yon masofa saqlayman

questionTextSource: What amount of side clearance must you maintain when overtaking pedestrians and cyclists?
explanationSource: To protect cyclists and pedestrians, you must keep a distance of at least 1.5 metres to the side in built-up areas and at least 2 metres outside built-up areas.
answerASource: - maintain a minimum side clearance of 1.5 m within a built-up area
answerBSource: - maintain a minimum side clearance of 2.0 m outside of a built-up area
answerCSource: - maintain a minimum side clearance of 1.0 m within a built-up area
questionTextTarget: Piyodalar va velosipedchilarni quvib o‘tganda qancha yon masofa saqlashingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Velosipedchilar va piyodalarni himoya qilish uchun aholi yashash hududida kamida 1,5 metr, aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida esa kamida 2 metr yon masofa saqlashingiz kerak.
answerATarget: - aholi yashash hududida kamida 1,5 m yon masofa saqlash
answerBTarget: - aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida kamida 2,0 m yon masofa saqlash
answerCTarget: - aholi yashash hududida kamida 1,0 m yon masofa saqlash

questionTextSource: What must you note when overtaking the cyclists in this situation?
explanationSource:
When overtaking in built-up areas, you must maintain a distance of at least 1.5 metres to the side of the cyclist. 
Due to the commuting of cyclists, a larger minimum distance is recommended.
answerASource: The incline causes the cyclists to sway
answerBSource: I must overtake with at least 1.5 m of side clearance
answerCSource: I must overtake with at least 1.0 m of side clearance
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda velosipedchilarni quvib o‘tayotganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Aholi yashash hududida quvib o‘tayotganda velosipedchining yonidan kamida 1,5 metr masofa saqlashingiz kerak. Velosipedchilarning tebranishi sabab yanada kattaroq minimal masofa tavsiya etiladi.
answerBTarget: Kamida 1,5 m yon masofa bilan quvib o‘tishim kerak
answerCTarget: Kamida 1,0 m yon masofa bilan quvib o‘tishim kerak

questionTextSource: What is the correct course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: The driving lane line is solid. Therefore, overtaking is forbidden here.
answerASource: I remain behind [the cyclist]
answerBSource: I overtake [the cyclist] with a sufficient amount of side clearance
answerCSource: I have to allow [the pedestrian] to cross the road
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lak chizig‘i uzluksiz. Shuning uchun bu yerda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan.
answerBTarget: [Velosipedchi]ni yetarli yon masofa bilan quvib o‘taman
answerCTarget: [Piyoda]ga yo‘lni kesib o‘tishga ruxsat berishim kerak

questionTextSource: Which vehicle must wait when half the roadway is closed because of roadworks?
explanationSource: If you want to drive past a parked car or a barrier on your side of the street, you must give priority to oncoming traffic, no matter how large the vehicle.
answerASource: The vehicle on the side of the roadway where the roadworks are
answerBSource: The vehicle on the unobstructed side of the roadway
questionTextTarget: Yo‘l ishlari sabab qatnov qismining yarmi yopilgan bo‘lsa, qaysi transport vositasi kutishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar siz ko‘chaning o‘z tomoningizdagi parkovka qilingan avtomobil yoki to‘siq yonidan o‘tmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, transport vositasi qanchalik katta bo‘lishidan qat’i nazar, qarshidan kelayotgan transportga yo‘l berishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Yo‘l ishlari joylashgan tomondagi transport vositasi

questionTextSource: Who must wait?
explanationSource: If you want to drive past a parked car or a barrier on the left side of the road, you must give priority to vehicles that meet you.
answerASource: I must wait
answerBSource: The oncoming vehicle must wait
questionTextTarget: Kim kutishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar yo‘lning chap tomonidagi parkovka qilingan avtomobil yoki to‘siq yonidan o‘tmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, qarshingizdan kelayotgan transport vositalariga yo‘l berishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Qarshidan kelayotgan transport vositasi kutishi kerak

questionTextSource: Why should you drive especially slowly here?
explanationSource: In front of you, a standing truck narrows the road. The view of traffic is limited. In front of the truck, pedestrians cross the street, which you may perceive too late, as their view is also blocked. Therefore, avoid the obstacle very slowly and carefully.
answerASource: - the truck is narrowing the lane
answerBSource: - people are proceeding onto the road
answerCSource: - I am approaching a traffic light junction
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda ayniqsa sekin haydashingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Oldingizda turgan yuk mashinasi yo‘lni toraytirgan. Harakatni ko‘rish cheklangan. Yuk mashinasi oldida piyodalar yo‘lni kesib o‘tmoqda, ularni juda kech payqashingiz mumkin, chunki ularning ko‘rinishi ham to‘silgan. Shuning uchun to‘siq yonidan juda sekin va ehtiyotkorlik bilan o‘ting.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: You want to drive around the vehicles parked on the right side of the road. But that is only possible when the oncoming cyclist has passed you by. Otherwise you would not be able to maintain the necessary lateral distance and therefore have to wait.
answerASource: Wait, because otherwise there would not be enough space between the cyclist and the car
answerBSource: Continue driving at a moderate speed, because there is very little space between the cyclist and the car
answerCSource: Continue driving as before, because there is sufficient space between the cyclist and the car
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Siz yo‘lning o‘ng tomonida parkovka qilingan transport vositalarini aylanib o‘tmoqchisiz. Ammo bu faqat qarshidan kelayotgan velosipedchi sizdan o‘tib ketganidan keyin mumkin. Aks holda zarur yon masofani saqlay olmaysiz va shu sabab kutishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Kutaman, chunki aks holda velosipedchi bilan avtomobil orasida yetarli joy bo‘lmaydi
answerBTarget: O‘rtacha tezlikda davom etaman, chunki velosipedchi bilan avtomobil orasida juda oz joy bor
answerCTarget: Oldingidek davom etaman, chunki velosipedchi bilan avtomobil orasida yetarli joy bor

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: Your visibility is limited by the van and you cannot tell if vehicles are coming towards you. Before driving on, make sure that there is no oncoming traffic approaching. You have to wait, because the construction site is on your lane.
answerASource: - if it is clear that there is no oncoming traffic
answerBSource: - so as not to impede the way of possible oncoming traffic
answerCSource: - because any possible oncoming traffic must already be waiting
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
